title: Dedupe
description: Redundancy in this world is pointless. Let’s get rid of all redundancy. For example AAABB is redundant. Why not just use AB? Given a string, remove all consecutive letters that are the same.
inputDesc: The first line in the data file is an integer that represents the number of data sets to follow. Each data set is a single string. The length of the string is less than 100. Each string only contains uppercase alphabetical letters.
